title: Client Build Tools
body:
# Client Build Tools (CBT)

Client-side building assistance tools for minecraft fabric

![icon](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/0x1bd/Client-Build-Tools/refs/heads/1.21.4/src/main/resources/assets/cbt/icon_128x128.png)

## Disclaimer

CBT is considered cheating on many servers due to the nature of the mod. **You may experience punishment for using this
mod on servers!**

## Functionality
CBT features multiple modes which can be switched by holding the G key (configurable) and scrolling the mouse.

Currently, there are 3 core modes featured in CBT:
- Line: Builds a horizontal line of blocks
- Wall: Builds a vertical line of blocks
- Patcher: Patches holes around the player

Each mode can also have a settings (e.g. Length, Height, Range) which can be changed by holding shift and the `Cycle Build Mode` key and scrolling the mouse. 

## FAQ

### Some blocks are placed wrong?
The mod is not perfect and sometimes blocks will be misplaced. I've taken measures to prevent this but since CBT is client-side only this behaviour is not 100% fixable.
